summary: Complete testing of Zoho Partner Tagging Purchase Gate feature. 23/23 backend tests pass. All UI flows verified end-to-end: Cart partner tag gate, Admin Override Codes CRUD, Admin Customers Partner Map column/filter/edit, Customer Notes modal.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <th/tr/tbody>' - caused by Emergent SDK's dynamic rendering wrapper injecting <span data-ve-dynamic> around table elements. Not a code bug, cosmetic issue only.

critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.tsx race condition: on full-page reload (not SPA navigation), the useEffect([items]) saves [] to localStorage BEFORE the useEffect([]) loads stored items, causing cart to appear empty on hard reload. This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to partner tagging. Works correctly with SPA navigation (clicking links). To fix: initialize items from localStorage synchronously (lazy initializer: useState(() => JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('aa_cart_items') || '[]')))

Cart.tsx: partner-tag-section rendered inside each checkout section loop. State (partnerTagResponse, overrideCode) is shared between sections - if a customer has BOTH one-time and subscription items, the partner tag section appears twice but controls the same state. This is acceptable but may look confusing.
OverrideCodesTab.jsx: override code table uses standard HTML table elements (.map()) which triggers Emergent SDK hydration warnings. Functionally correct.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test override codes created during backend testing: TEST-CREATE-001, TEST-DUP-001, TEST-UPDATE-AFTER, TEST-DEACTIVATE-001, TEST-ACTIVE-STATUS-001, TEST-EXPIRED-STATUS-001, TEST-EXPIRED-CODE-001, TEST-UI-CODE-001. TEST-OVERRIDE-001 (pre-existing) untouched.

features_verified.cart_partner_tag_dropdown: PASS - dropdown shows 3 options: Yes/Pre-existing Customer/Not yet
features_verified.cart_checkout_disabled_no_tag: PASS - checkout button disabled when no tag selected
features_verified.cart_checkout_disabled_not_yet_no_code: PASS - checkout button disabled when 'Not yet' + no override code
features_verified.cart_override_code_input_visible: PASS - override code input shown only when 'Not yet' selected
features_verified.cart_checkout_enabled: PASS - checkout enabled with partner tag + terms accepted
features_verified.backend_checkout_blocked_not_yet_no_code: PASS - 400 with 'Not yet' + no override code
features_verified.backend_checkout_blocked_wrong_customer: PASS - 400 with code assigned to different customer
features_verified.admin_override_codes_tab: PASS - visible at /admin with proper UI
features_verified.admin_create_override_code: PASS - creates with customer assignment, success toast
features_verified.admin_duplicate_code_rejected: PASS - error shown for duplicate code
features_verified.admin_edit_override_code: PASS - edit modal, status/expires/customer editable, Save Changes works
features_verified.admin_deactivate_override_code: PASS - deactivate button works, code becomes inactive
features_verified.admin_partner_map_column: PASS - Partner Map column in customers table with color coding
features_verified.admin_partner_map_filter: PASS - filter dropdown filters customers by partner map value
features_verified.admin_partner_map_inline_edit: PASS - inline edit with select, save via PUT /api/admin/customers/{id}/partner-map
features_verified.admin_customer_notes_modal: PASS - Notes button opens modal showing customer notes
features_verified.backend_partner_map_audit_log: PASS - audit log created on partner_map update (confirmed in code review)
features_verified.partner_map_updated_after_checkout: PASS - partner_map set to 'Yes - Pending Verification' after checkout with 'Yes'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Tagging Purchase Gate fully implemented and verified. Backend: 23/23 tests pass. All endpoints working: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/override-codes, PUT /api/admin/customers/{id}/partner-map, GET /api/admin/customers/{id}/notes. Checkout validation enforces partner tag at backend level. Cart UI shows partner tag dropdown before each checkout section. Admin Override Codes tab has full CRUD. CustomerNotes modal works. TEST-OVERRIDE-001 still active and assigned to admin customer (0be90bfa-*). CartContext has a pre-existing localStorage race condition on hard page reload - use SPA navigation for cart testing.
